slide1.title: China's Premium Special Oil Source

sourceStory.title: Your Trusted Gateway to China's Specialty Oil Supply Chain
sourceStory.description1: As a professional supply chain service platform, we specialize in connecting international buyers with leading Chinese manufacturers of specialty oils—including transformer oil, white oil, rubber oil, and other refined oil products.
sourceStory.description2: We provide end-to-end solutions designed to streamline cross-border procurement. Our services cover the entire process: sourcing coordination, quality assurance, logistics, port consolidation, and export customs clearance.

products.title: China's Special Oil Products

hero.title: China Special Oil Supply Chain
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in China's Specialty Oil Supply Chain

story.title: Connecting China's Premium Special Oils to Global Markets
story.p1: Founded in 2025, we have quickly established ourselves as a dedicated supply chain platform with a clear mission: to provide the world with access to premium quality special oils from China's most reputable manufacturers.
story.p2: We specialize in sourcing and delivering high-quality Chinese special oils, connecting global industrial clients with premium manufacturers. Our core expertise lies in providing integrated supply chain solutions for procurement, quality control, and logistics.
story.p3: With a team of industry professionals who bring extensive experience in the oil and gas sector, we've built strong partnerships with manufacturers to ensure our customers receive exceptional products at competitive prices, every time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide reliable, efficient, and transparent supply chain services that connect global buyers with China's specialty oil manufacturers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted bridge between international markets and China's specialty oil industry.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We ensure every product meets international standards

supplyChain.title: Our Complete Supply Chain Solution
supplyChain.intro: We offer a seamless supply chain solution that covers every step from sourcing to delivery, ensuring our customers receive high-quality Chinese special oils efficiently and reliably.
supplyChain.step1Desc: Direct access to premium special oil manufacturers in China, with rigorous supplier qualification processes.
supplyChain.step2Desc: Comprehensive testing and inspection at multiple stages to ensure products meet international standards.
supplyChain.step3Desc: Complete handling of export documentation, customs clearance, and compliance with international trade regulations.
supplyChain.step4Desc: Reliable shipping solutions to ports worldwide, with flexible options to meet your specific needs.

quality.title: Rigorous Quality Control
quality.intro: We understand that quality is paramount for industrial lubricants. Our comprehensive quality control system ensures that every product meets the highest international standards and your specific requirements.

lab.title: Laboratory Testing
lab.intro: Our products undergo rigorous testing in ISO-certified laboratories to ensure they meet all technical specifications.

inspection.title: Factory Inspection
inspection.intro: Regular factory audits and inspections ensure consistent manufacturing quality.

global.title: Our Global Presence
global.intro: We have successfully delivered Chinese special oils to industrial customers in more than 50 countries worldwide. Our experience in international trade ensures smooth transactions and on-time deliveries.

distribution.title: Regional Distribution
distribution.desc: Strategically located warehouses in key regions to ensure prompt delivery and local support.

support.title: Multilingual Support
support.desc: Our team speaks English and Chinese to better serve our global customers.

shipping.title: Flexible Shipping
shipping.desc: Various shipping options including FOB, CFR, CIF, and DDP to meet your specific requirements.

testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.quote1: The quality of Chinese special oils we received was exceptional, and the supply chain service made the entire process seamless.
testimonials.quote2: We've been importing transformer oil from China through this platform for 5 years now. Consistent quality and reliable deliveries every time.

hero.title: SpecVolt™ Series
hero.subtitle: Engineered for the most demanding high-voltage applications

overview.title: Superior Transformer Protection
overview.description1: SpecVolt™ Transformer Oils are premium naphthenic-based lubricants specifically designed to provide exceptional insulation, cooling, and protection for high-voltage transformers and electrical equipment.
overview.description2: We source transformer oils from leading Chinese manufacturers, offering products with naturally low sulfur content and superior dielectric properties. Our supply chain services ensure consistent quality and reliable performance for demanding applications.

specifications.title: Product Specifications
specifications.description: SpecVolt™ Transformer Oils are available in three premium grades, each designed to meet specific application requirements and operating conditions. All grades meet or exceed international standards for transformer oils.

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: SpecVolt™ Transformer Oils are designed for use in a wide range of electrical equipment where excellent insulation properties, heat transfer capabilities, and oxidation resistance are critical requirements.

highVoltage.title: High-Voltage Transformers
highVoltage.description: Ideal for power generation and transmission transformers operating under extreme conditions.

distribution.title: Distribution Transformers
distribution.description: Provides excellent protection for medium and low voltage distribution networks.

instrument.title: Instrument Transformers
instrument.description: Ensures reliable performance for current and voltage transformers in metering systems.

switchgear.title: Switchgear Equipment
switchgear.description: Offers superior insulation and cooling properties for circuit breakers and switchgear.

benefits.title: Performance Benefits
benefits.description: SpecVolt™ Transformer Oils provide numerous advantages over conventional transformer oils, helping to extend equipment life, improve reliability, and reduce maintenance costs.

dielectric.title: Enhanced Dielectric Strength
dielectric.description: Superior insulation properties that maintain system integrity under high voltage stress.

serviceLife.title: Extended Service Life
serviceLife.description: Excellent oxidation resistance that extends oil life and reduces maintenance frequency.

heatTransfer.title: Superior Heat Transfer
heatTransfer.description: Optimized thermal properties that improve cooling efficiency and reduce hot spots.

protection.title: Equipment Protection
protection.description: Zero corrosive sulfur formulation that prevents copper corrosion and sludge formation.

economic.title: Economic Benefits
items: Reduced maintenance costs due to extended oil life
Lower equipment replacement costs through better protection
Minimized downtime and improved system reliability
Energy efficiency improvements through optimized cooling
Long-term cost savings compared to conventional oils

environmental.title: Environmental Benefits
items: Naturally low sulfur content reduces environmental impact
Extended oil life reduces waste generation and disposal needs
Recyclable product that supports circular economy principles

packaging.title: Packaging & Delivery
packaging.description: SpecVolt™ Transformer Oils are available in a variety of packaging options to meet your specific requirements, from small containers for maintenance to bulk deliveries for large installations.

bucket18L.description: Ideal for small maintenance jobs and topping up

drum200L.description: Perfect for medium-sized installations and projects

ibc1000L.description: For larger industrial applications and projects

hero.title: SpecFlex™ Series
hero.subtitle: Engineered for superior rubber processing and end-product performance

overview.title: Superior Rubber Processing Solutions
overview.description1: SpecFlex™ Rubber Process Oils are premium naphthenic-based oils specifically designed to enhance the processing and performance of rubber compounds.
overview.description2: We provide rubber process oils from trusted Chinese producers, featuring high solvency (Cn% > 35%) and excellent compatibility with various rubber types. Our end-to-end solutions support seamless procurement for specialized industrial applications.

feature2.title: EU REACH Compliant
feature2.description: Low PAHs content for regulatory compliance

specifications.title: Product Specifications
specifications.description: SpecFlex™ Rubber Process Oils are available in three carefully formulated grades to meet the specific requirements of different rubber applications, from shoe soles to high-performance tires.

regulatory.title: Regulatory Compliance
items: FDA 21 CFR 178.3620(a) for indirect food contact

applications.title: Applications
applications.description: SpecFlex™ Rubber Process Oils are designed for use in a wide range of rubber products and applications, providing excellent processing properties and enhancing end-product performance.

industrialBelts.name: Industrial Belts

buildingConstruction.name: Building & Construction
buildingConstruction.description: Suitable for gaskets, roofing membranes, and waterproofing materials

benefits.title: Performance Benefits
benefits.description: SpecFlex™ Rubber Process Oils provide numerous advantages in rubber processing and end-product performance, helping manufacturers achieve better quality and efficiency.

superiorProcessing.title: Superior Processing
superiorProcessing.description: Improves rubber flow properties and mold filling during processing.

environmentallyFriendly.title: Environmentally Friendly
environmentallyFriendly.description: Low PAH content meets EU REACH requirements.

items: Improved dispersion of fillers and additives
Lower processing temperatures and cycle times
Enhanced mold flow and cavity filling
Reduced scrap rates and production waste

endProductImprovements.title: End-Product Improvements
items: Superior resistance to aging and environmental factors

hydraulicOils.description: Our hydraulic oils are specially formulated to provide exceptional protection and performance in modern high-pressure hydraulic systems operating under severe conditions.

lhm.name: SpecLube L-HM (High Pressure)
lhm.description: Advanced anti-wear hydraulic oil designed for high-pressure systems operating at normal to elevated temperatures. Meets DIN 51524 Part 2 specifications.

lhv.name: SpecLube L-HV (Low Temperature)
lhv.description: Premium hydraulic oil with excellent low-temperature fluidity for systems operating in cold climates. Provides superior protection at temperatures as low as -40°C.

lhs.name: SpecLube L-HS (Synthetic)
lhs.description: Full synthetic hydraulic oil for extreme applications requiring maximum protection against wear, oxidation, and thermal degradation.

process.title: Our Quality Process
process.intro: At CN-SpecLube Chain, we maintain rigorous quality control throughout our entire supply chain, from raw material sourcing to finished product delivery. Our commitment to quality ensures that every product meets the highest industry standards.

step1.title: Strategic Sourcing
step1.desc: We partner with leading Chinese specialty oil manufacturers, carefully selecting suppliers known for their exceptional quality standards and consistent product excellence.

step2.title: Hydro-treating
step2.desc: Our advanced hydro-treating process removes impurities and stabilizes the base oil, ensuring superior performance characteristics and extended service life.

step3.title: CNAS Lab Test
step3.desc: All our products undergo rigorous testing in our CNAS-accredited laboratory, ensuring compliance with international standards and specifications.

step4.title: Shipment
step4.desc: We ensure proper packaging and handling during shipment to maintain product integrity, with complete documentation for customs clearance and quality assurance.

qms.title: Quality Management System
qms.intro: Our ISO 9001-certified Quality Management System ensures consistent product quality and continuous improvement throughout our operations.

certificates.title: Our Certifications
certificates.intro: We maintain various international certifications to ensure our products and processes meet the highest standards.

standards.title: International Standards
standards.intro: All our products comply with international quality standards and specifications.
standards.astm: American Society for Testing and Materials standards for petroleum products
standards.iso: International Organization for Standardization specifications for lubricants
standards.din: Deutsches Institut für Normung specifications for industrial applications
standards.gb: Chinese national standards for petroleum and chemical products
standards.api: American Petroleum Institute performance standards for engine oils
standards.reach: Registration, Evaluation, Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals

testing.title: Testing Methods
testing.intro: Comprehensive testing ensures product quality and performance.

viscosity.name: Viscosity Measurement
viscosity.desc: Testing of oil viscosity at various temperatures to ensure proper lubrication properties

flashPoint.name: Flash Point Testing
flashPoint.desc: Determination of the lowest temperature at which the oil vapors ignite

pourPoint.name: Pour Point Testing
pourPoint.desc: Measurement of the lowest temperature at which the oil remains fluid

acidNumber.name: Acid Number Determination
acidNumber.desc: Testing of acidic properties to evaluate oxidation and degradation levels

elemental.name: Elemental Analysis
elemental.desc: Measurement of additive elements concentration using advanced spectroscopy techniques

particle.name: Particle Counting
particle.desc: Evaluation of the cleanliness level of lubricants using laser particle counters

cta.title: Need Quality Assurance Documentation?
cta.desc: Contact us to request certificates of analysis, test reports, or quality documentation.

isoTank.description: Stainless steel tanks designed for safe and efficient transportation of bulk liquids. Loading capacity varies by product density—typically 21,000-26,000L depending on the specific gravity of the liquid being transported.

flexibag.title: Flexibag
flexibag.description: Flexible intermediate bulk containers with heating pad available for temperature-sensitive products.

customs.title: Customs & Compliance
customs.description: We have extensive experience in international trade regulations and customs procedures, ensuring smooth and compliant shipments to destinations worldwide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documentation do I need to provide for international shipping?
faq.a1: For most international shipments, we require your company details, port of destination, and preferred Incoterms. We will handle the preparation of all necessary shipping documents based on your specific requirements.
faq.q2: How do you ensure compliance with international regulations?
faq.a2: Our logistics team stays updated on the latest international trade regulations and maintains close relationships with regulatory authorities. We conduct regular training and audits to ensure full compliance with all applicable laws and standards.
faq.q3: Can you assist with customs clearance at the destination port?
faq.a3: Yes, we have a global network of customs brokers and agents who can assist with customs clearance at virtually any destination port worldwide. We can provide DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) services for a complete door-to-door solution.

globalNetwork.title: Global Network
globalNetwork.description: Comprehensive logistics network covering all major regions worldwide

productSafety.title: Product Safety
productSafety.description: Stringent safety protocols to ensure product integrity during transportation

onTimeDelivery.title: On-Time Delivery
onTimeDelivery.description: Reliable transportation solutions with commitment to delivery schedules

dedicatedSupport.title: Dedicated Support

form.title: Request a Quote
form.subtitle: Fill out the form below to get a competitive quote for Chinese special oils. Our team will respond within 24 hours.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your specific requirements, technical specifications, or any questions
form.protectedBy: This form is protected by hCaptcha and its

email.title: Email Us
email.description: For fastest response, email our international team

q1.question: What types of special oils do you supply from China?
q1.answer: We supply a wide range of Chinese special oils including transformer oil, rubber process oil, hydraulic oil, gear oil, turbine oil, heat transfer oil, and other industrial lubricants.

q2.question: What certifications do your products have?
q2.answer: Our products meet various international standards including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ASTM, DIN, IEC, and EU REACH compliance. We can provide specific certificates for each product upon request.

q3.question: What Incoterms do you support?
q3.answer: We support all major Incoterms including EXW, FOB, CFR, CIF, DAP, and DDP to provide flexibility for our international customers.

q4.question: What is your lead time for orders?
q4.answer: Standard lead time is 7-14 days after order confirmation and receipt of payment. For large volume orders or custom products, lead time may be extended accordingly.

q5.question: Can you provide product samples?
q5.answer: Yes, we can provide free product samples for quality evaluation. Customers are responsible for shipping costs. Contact our sales team to request samples.

q6.question: How do you ensure product quality?
q6.answer: We conduct rigorous quality control through multiple inspections, laboratory testing, and factory audits. All products undergo testing before shipment to ensure they meet international standards and customer requirements.
